news.title: U.S. blockade of Strait of Hormuz set to begin
news.summary: The U.S. blockade, set to begin at 10 a.m. ET, will apply to "any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz," President Donald Trump said.

news.title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading — here's why the stock is falling
news.summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter, helping propel the overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue.

news.title: Revolution Medicines' potential breakthrough pancreatic cancer drug succeeds in late-stage trial
news.summary: Revolution Medicines' drug for pancreatic cancer succeeded in a highly anticipated Phase 3 trial.

news.title: OpenAI touts Amazon alliance in memo, says Microsoft has 'limited our ability' to reach clients
news.summary: In an internal memo, OpenAI's new revenue chief pointed to the artificial intelligence company's ongoing effort to reduce its reliance on Microsoft.

news.title: Trump blasts Pope Leo for criticism of U.S. foreign policy
news.summary: Leo, the first U.S.-born pope who hails from Chicago, has condemned Trump's war effort with Iran.

news.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
news.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

news.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
news.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

news.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
news.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

news.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
news.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

news.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
news.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

key_events: 美国宣布封锁霍尔木兹海峡
